title: Battle Totem
description: Adds the Battle Totem to Minecraft, activate it to summon waves of hostile mobs, survive the fight, and earn powerful rewards!
body:
# Battle Totem

**The Battle Totem is a new challenge structure that generates naturally in your Minecraft world.**

![Battle totem in minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd7114c59e6631440be4701db75c4c96c4d2b94f.jpeg)

## ⚔️ How it works:

- Find a Battle Totem while exploring.
- Right–click to awaken it and unleash 3 hard mobs.
- If you can't find the mobs you can right-click the totem again to apply glow effect on mobs.
- Defeat them all and claim your rewarding loot.

## 🔰 Possible Loots 🔰

![Minecraft chest with loot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/838deb8356027e7c5b5473fb7fd92b231ff3fe8f.gif)
